description: Canonical event catalog for Buddy runtime behaviors. Events drive XP, bond, proficiency, memory promotion, receipts, install flow, publish flow, and state transitions.

eventTypes.description: A new Buddy instance is created from onboarding or install.
A user renames or customizes an installed Buddy.
A daily check-in or reflection completes.
A Buddy assists with a real task or workflow.
A Buddy completes a personal, shared, or weekly challenge.
A memory candidate is accepted into durable markdown memory.
Buddy mood changes due to use, inactivity, or outcomes.
Evolution requirements are satisfied and a new tier unlocks.
A live Buddy is packaged into a template draft.
A template draft is sanitized and private state is stripped.
A template is installed into a clean local Buddy copy.
A concrete receipt is recorded for an action or state change.

commonEffectFields.xpDelta: Integer XP change applied after validation.
commonEffectFields.bondDelta: Integer bond progress change with soft-cap handling.
commonEffectFields.proficiencyDeltas: Map of training category to delta.
commonEffectFields.moodTarget: Next buddy mood if transition is accepted by state machine.
commonEffectFields.stateTransition: Lifecycle transition request evaluated against the Buddy state machine.
commonEffectFields.memoryCandidate: Candidate payload for durable memory extraction.
commonEffectFields.badgeGrant: Badge or achievement identifier to grant.
commonEffectFields.passiveUnlock: Passive or passive upgrade identifier to unlock.
commonEffectFields.signatureUpgrade: Signature move upgrade identifier to unlock.
commonEffectFields.receiptRef: Concrete receipt or log identifier proving the action happened.
